items.question: How do I sign in?
items.answer: Enter a username in the Session panel and click Sign In. For admin access, use the Admin Sign In button — your username must be on the server allowlist.

items.question: How does the AI planner work?
items.answer: Enter a short-term goal (up to 500 characters) and click Generate. The AI considers your existing tasks for that goal to avoid duplicates, plus tasks from other goals for broader context. A preview list appears — review it, set a difficulty, then click Create All Planned Tasks to commit.

items.question: What are story points?
items.answer: Each task carries a difficulty rating from 1 to 6 SP. Completing a task awards those points to your session. Accumulate enough to climb writing tiers: Poem → Paragraph → Short Story → Novel → Epic. Points persist across sessions per username.

items.question: How do I clear AI-generated tasks?
items.answer: Once tasks have been created from a plan, the Goal Tracking panel (at the bottom of Task Manager) shows a 'Clear AI (N)' button for each goal that has AI-generated tasks. Clicking it removes only those tasks, leaving manually created ones untouched.

items.question: What is the Kanban board?
items.answer: The Board view organises your tasks into To Do, In Progress, and Done columns. Drag cards between columns or use the status dropdown on each card. Status changes are saved immediately.

items.question: Where do CMS edits appear?
items.answer: Admins can edit site content (this page's sections, FAQ, and header copy) through the CMS at /admin. Changes are written to the content JSON files and reflected after the next deployment or page reload.
